sevenDay.synopsis: An approaching frontal boundary will bring showers/ISOLD TS for the PM and maybe the early part of the N1. Greatest coverage will be to our S. Once this front clears the area, the weather looks good for the remainder of the week with VFR and NEG hazards expected.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 11 MAY - 17 MAY
